title: Registration of Seafarers. The Department shall maintain a registry of all
content: 55 Filipino seafarers: Provided, That the registry of seafarers aboard ocean-going ships, 56 whether foreign registered or Philippine registered, shall be integrated into the shared 57 government information system for migration established under R.A. No. 8042, as 58 amended by R.A. No. 10022. 59 60 58 The registry shall contain updated and relevant information or data to promote 1 employment opportunities for seafarers, whether on board or ashore, or to provide a list 2 of available training and education programs to support the skills development and 3 improve on the competencies of seafarers, as well as provide a digitized copy of the duly 4 executed contract. The Department shall adopt and maintain a system of registration of 5 seafarers according to skills, occupation or such classification as it may deem expedient 6 and effective. 7 8 The Department shall ensure compliance with R.A. No. 10173 and its IRR in handling 9 seafarer’s relevant information or data in their respective registries. 10 11 12 Seafarer Research and Development 13 14
